displayTitle: Knights of the Old Republic #45: Destroyer, Part 1
synopsis: Despite a disastrous first encounter with the Crucible, Zayne Carrick is still determined to end the brutality they promote in their business. But this time, he plans to break them from the inside out! Having set himself up to be captured by the slavers, when this former Padawan arrives at the Crucible's training facility, it will be all he can do to survive, let alone focus on learning about their organization. His connection to the Force will give him an unexpected insight - one that he doesn't necessarily want. And when a past nemesis of his friend Jarael appears, Zayne begins to worry that
title: Knights of the Old Republic #45: Destroyer, Part 1
